collections.title: AI Researcher Pack
collections.description: Tools for searching the web, papers and bringing live context into your agent.
collections.rationale: These five cover the research loop: find docs (exa, context7), check arxiv (arxiv-search), pull live models (huggingface-hub), web-search alternatives (tavily).

collections.title: PDF & Document Pack
collections.description: Convert, OCR and trim document files (PDF, images, scans).
collections.rationale: Anything that takes a binary document and gives an agent something to read.

collections.title: Agent Foundation Pack
collections.description: Cross-cutting infrastructure skills every agent eventually needs.
collections.rationale: Stable, low-trust-churn utilities: environment inspection, tracing, shell-quoting, JSON shaping.

collections.title: Database & Backend Pack
collections.description: Connect agents to live databases, search systems and backends.
collections.rationale: Spans SQL via Supabase, ML infrastructure, code review for source-of-truth backends.
